source.title: Postnatal Care Program Standards
source.population: Postpartum women and newborns during the first six weeks following childbirth.
source.setting: DoH-licensed facility, outpatient, home-visit, and teleconsultation postnatal services in Abu Dhabi.
source.exclusions: Direct for Abu Dhabi postnatal follow-up during the first six weeks; partial for later postpartum care and settings outside Abu Dhabi.

items.rationale: Supports detailed postnatal maternal assessment for postpartum mood follow-up; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Supports recording that suicidal ideation, intent, support and immediate risk were directly assessed by a competent clinician; it does not populate a negative, assign risk, or generate escalation.

source.title: Depression in adults: treatment and management — Recommendations
source.jurisdiction: England and Wales; international evidence requiring UAE mental-health, crisis, referral, and legal adaptation
source.population: Adults with possible or diagnosed depression; communication and carer involvement are qualified.
source.setting: Primary and mental healthcare recognition and assessment.
source.exclusions: Exact for documenting mood and interest screening, duration, course, function, social and interpersonal context, sleep, substances, medicines, loneliness and clinician-completed risk assessment. It does not diagnose depression or generate a referral or treatment.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.2.8–1.2.12 — clinician-completed risk assessment

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports recording that suicidal ideation, intent, support and immediate risk were directly assessed by a competent clinician; it does not populate a negative, assign risk, or generate escalation.

items.rationale: Supports clinician-completed mental-health risk assessment for postpartum mood follow-up; no decision is generated.

added_items.final_wording: Requires maternal physical and emotional assessment, postpartum haemorrhage and hypertensive-risk screening, feeding support, family planning discussion, continuity, and EMR documentation.

source.title: Postnatal Care Program Standards
source.population: Postpartum women and newborns during the first six weeks following childbirth.
source.setting: DoH-licensed facility, outpatient, home-visit, and teleconsultation postnatal services in Abu Dhabi.
source.exclusions: Direct for Abu Dhabi postnatal follow-up during the first six weeks; partial for later postpartum care and settings outside Abu Dhabi.

exact_location.heading: 3.1 Core Components — maternal physical and emotional health, education, support, and continuity

source.evidence_paraphrase: Requires maternal physical and emotional assessment, postpartum haemorrhage and hypertensive-risk screening, feeding support, family planning discussion, continuity, and EMR documentation.

added_items.rationale: Supports postnatal emotional-health assessment, education, support and continuity for postpartum mood follow-up; no decision is generated.

added_items.final_wording: Specifies vital signs, uterine involution, lochia, wound healing, bladder and bowel function, feeding, mood, support, family planning, pelvic floor, indicated tests, and documented follow-up.

source.title: Postnatal Care Program Standards
source.population: Postpartum women and newborns during the first six weeks following childbirth.
source.setting: DoH-licensed facility, outpatient, home-visit, and teleconsultation postnatal services in Abu Dhabi.
source.exclusions: Direct for Abu Dhabi postnatal follow-up during the first six weeks; partial for later postpartum care and settings outside Abu Dhabi.

exact_location.heading: Appendices 2 and 3 — detailed maternal postnatal and home-visit checks

source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies vital signs, uterine involution, lochia, wound healing, bladder and bowel function, feeding, mood, support, family planning, pelvic floor, indicated tests, and documented follow-up.

added_items.rationale: Supports detailed postnatal maternal assessment for postpartum mood follow-up; no decision is generated.

added_items.final_wording: Supports recording that suicidal ideation, intent, support and immediate risk were directly assessed by a competent clinician; it does not populate a negative, assign risk, or generate escalation.

source.title: Depression in adults: treatment and management — Recommendations
source.jurisdiction: England and Wales; international evidence requiring UAE mental-health, crisis, referral, and legal adaptation
source.population: Adults with possible or diagnosed depression; communication and carer involvement are qualified.
source.setting: Primary and mental healthcare recognition and assessment.
source.exclusions: Exact for documenting mood and interest screening, duration, course, function, social and interpersonal context, sleep, substances, medicines, loneliness and clinician-completed risk assessment. It does not diagnose depression or generate a referral or treatment.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.2.8–1.2.12 — clinician-completed risk assessment

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports recording that suicidal ideation, intent, support and immediate risk were directly assessed by a competent clinician; it does not populate a negative, assign risk, or generate escalation.

added_items.rationale: Supports clinician-completed mental-health risk assessment for postpartum mood follow-up; no decision is generated.
